posts.raw_content:
Remember that government lady in white coat on TV every day: "stay home, trust the experts, more rules for your 'safety' ?"

that's Amy Acton, the same doc who locked down Ohio hard during covid

closed businesses, shut schools, killed dreams with one signature after another

remember how it felt in your wallet? empty pockets
main street stores boarded up, factories quiet, families moving away

small business with the "closed by order" sign
now she wants to be governor and she'll have bigger, statewide, long-term control

Her sinister stupid plan is simple: more layers of government telling you what to do. More taxes, more bureaucrats, more "for your own good" controls on your life, your work, your kids. 

She loved the big lockdown power trip. She'll bring back the same nanny state crap but with new paint.

I was seeing Vivek Ramaswamy the other day talking about how he wants to shrink Ohio's 2,000 taxing authorities. What the heck, 
I didn't even know there were that many, that’s way too many layers of government. We gotta shrink bureaucracy, cut red tape, and put that $$ back in our pockets.

Less government sucking our money. More freedom. More jobs. Strong Ohio again.

Ohioans, this ain't a game. Drag your whole family, your neighbors, your coworkers to the polls in November. Vote like your kids' future depends on it, because it does.

Stop Amy Acton cold.
MAGA energy in the Buckeye State. Let's go. No brakes.
